title: Pokemon Detail Lookup, Derived Views, Units, and Provenance · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Detail Provenance Tests
summary: The inspect command dumps transport JSON, displays raw decimeter and hectogram values without labels, loses API provenance, and panics when optional nested entries are empty. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go detail provenance tests increment in human-readable validated Pokemon detail view. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Verify request identity, response identity, source URL, cache state, unit conversion, sorting, missing fields, and changed fixtures.
Compute ordered summaries without inventing facts, preserve hidden-ability status, and distinguish empty from unavailable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
